_comment_scenario: scenarios/144-composer-http-repo — CICD-SEC-3 (Dependency Chain Abuse) — Composer. DANGER (1): a custom repository is declared over plain HTTP, so packages resolve with no TLS. DANGER (2): config.secure-http is false, which disables Composer's HTTPS enforcement globally and silences the protection that would otherwise refuse the HTTP repo. SAFETY: static fixture nested under scenarios/; composer is never invoked here, pipeline-check parses composer.json statically. See README.md.
name: acme/site
